tools.name: a2a_public_discovery_api_agents_public_get
tools.description:
A2A Public Discovery

A2A-compatible open discovery endpoint.

Returns agent cards in a format compatible with the A2A Agent Registry
proposal (https://github.com/a2aproject/A2A/discussions/741).

### Responses:

**200**: Successful Response (Success Response)
Content-Type: application/json

tools.name: a2a_public_agent_card_api_agents_public__agent_id__get
tools.description:
A2A Public Agent Card

Return a single agent's A2A card by ID.

### Responses:

**200**: Successful Response (Success Response)
Content-Type: application/json

tools.name: list_agents_api_agents_get
tools.description:
List Agents

List AI agents in the Agentry directory with optional filtering and pagination.

Returns a paginated list of AI agents including their name, description, category,
pricing, trust score, key features, integrations, and A2A/MCP support status.
The directory contains 122+ agents across 11

tools.name: search_agents_api_agents_search_get
tools.description:
Search Agents

Search the Agentry AI agent directory by keyword.

Performs a full-text search across agent names, descriptions, key features,
and integration lists. Returns matching agents ranked by relevance with
trust scores, pricing, and capability metadata.

### Responses:

**200**: Successful R

tools.name: list_categories_api_agents_categories_get
tools.description:
List Categories

List all agent categories with counts.

Returns every category in the directory along with the number of agents
in each. Useful for building category filters or understanding the
directory's coverage areas.

### Responses:

**200**: Successful Response (Success Response)
Content-Typ

tools.description:
Get Agent

Get full details for a specific AI agent by ID.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "send_ecash_api_payments_ecash_send_post" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

labels.name: check_quote_api_payments_ecash_mint_quote__quote_id__get
labels.description:
Check Quote

Check the payment status of a mint quote.

### Responses:

**200**: Successful Response (Success Response)
Content-Type: application/json

labels.name: create_melt_quote_api_payments_ecash_melt_quote_post
labels.description:
Create Melt Quote

Get a quote to melt ecash into a Lightning payment (NUT-05).

Used when an agent wants to pay a Lightning invoice using their ecash.

### Responses:

**200**: Successful Response (Success Response)
Content-Type: application/json

labels.name: send_ecash_api_payments_ecash_send_post
labels.description:
Send Ecash

Send ecash tokens from one agent to another.

Two modes:
1. Provide a pre-minted `token` (cashuA...) — we verify and record the transfer
2. No token — returns instructions for the sender to mint one first

The token is bearer — whoever holds it can redeem it. This endpoint
records the in

labels.name: receive_ecash_api_payments_ecash_receive_post
labels.description:
Receive Ecash

Receive/redeem a Cashu ecash token.

The agent swaps the received proofs for new ones at the mint,
ensuring the sender can't double-spend. This is the standard
Cashu receive flow (NUT-03 swap).

### Responses:

**200**: Successful Response (Success Response)
Content-Type: application/

labels.name: verify_token_api_payments_ecash_verify_post
labels.description:
Verify Token

Verify a Cashu ecash token — check format, amount, and spent status.

### Responses:

**200**: Successful Response (Success Response)
Content-Type: application/json

labels.name: payment_required_api_payments_ecash_402__agent_id__get
labels.description:
Payment Required

Return a 402 Payment Required response with X-Cashu headers.

This endpoint lets agents advertise that they charge for services.
Calling agents receive:
- HTTP 402 status
- X-Cashu header with mint + amount info
- Body with payment instructions

The calling agent then mints a token

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_agent_api_agents__agent_id__get, register_agent_api_agents_register_post, submit_intake_api_broker_intake_post, create_quote_api_payments_ecash_mint_quote_post, create_melt_quote_api_payments_ecash_melt_quote_post, receive_ecash_api_payments_ecash_receive_post, verify_token_api_payments_ecash_verify_post, discover_single_agent_api_registry_discover__agent_id__post, get_badge_json_api_badges__agent_id__json_get · Private data: create_quote_api_payments_ecash_mint_quote_post, send_ecash_api_payments_ecash_send_post, receive_ecash_api_payments_ecash_receive_post, verify_token_api_payments_ecash_verify_post, payment_required_api_payments_ecash_402__agent_id__get, send_outreach_api_admin_outreach_post · Public sink: register_agent_api_agents_register_post, submit_intake_api_broker_intake_post, trigger_scan_api_scanner_scan_post, create_quote_api_payments_ecash_mint_quote_post, create_melt_quote_api_payments_ecash_melt_quote_post, send_ecash_api_payments_ecash_send_post, receive_ecash_api_payments_ecash_receive_post, verify_token_api_payments_ecash_verify_post, payment_required_api_payments_ecash_402__agent_id__get, trigger_discovery_cycle_api_registry_discover_post, discover_single_agent_api_registry_discover__agent_id__post, claim_agent_api_agents_claim_post, send_outreach_api_admin_outreach_post · Destructive: a2a_public_discovery_api_agents_public_get, verify_token_api_payments_ecash_verify_post, trigger_discovery_cycle_api_registry_discover_post, get_badge_json_api_badges__agent_id__json_get.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_agent_api_agents__agent_id__get, register_agent_api_agents_register_post, submit_intake_api_broker_intake_post, create_quote_api_payments_ecash_mint_quote_post, create_melt_quote_api_payments_ecash_melt_quote_post, receive_ecash_api_payments_ecash_receive_post, verify_token_api_payments_ecash_verify_post, discover_single_agent_api_registry_discover__agent_id__post, get_badge_json_api_badges__agent_id__json_get · Private data: create_quote_api_payments_ecash_mint_quote_post, send_ecash_api_payments_ecash_send_post, receive_ecash_api_payments_ecash_receive_post, verify_token_api_payments_ecash_verify_post, payment_required_api_payments_ecash_402__agent_id__get, send_outreach_api_admin_outreach_post · Public sink: register_agent_api_agents_register_post, submit_intake_api_broker_intake_post, trigger_scan_api_scanner_scan_post, create_quote_api_payments_ecash_mint_quote_post, create_melt_quote_api_payments_ecash_melt_quote_post, send_ecash_api_payments_ecash_send_post, receive_ecash_api_payments_ecash_receive_post, verify_token_api_payments_ecash_verify_post, payment_required_api_payments_ecash_402__agent_id__get, trigger_discovery_cycle_api_registry_discover_post, discover_single_agent_api_registry_discover__agent_id__post, claim_agent_api_agents_claim_post, send_outreach_api_admin_outreach_post · Destructive: a2a_public_discovery_api_agents_public_get, verify_token_api_payments_ecash_verify_post, trigger_discovery_cycle_api_registry_discover_post, get_badge_json_api_badges__agent_id__json_get

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
